So for you to be an efficient digital agency owner and a true entrepreneur, whether it be in this business or any other business that you so choose to run in the future, you need to understand operations. Now, I'm not going to go into team building and execution as I have an entire phase built out on just that information alone. What I'm going to go into are how to set up, how to structure, how to use systems, how to overall implement what you need as accountability when you do build a team. And I need to have you set up an overall cash flow operation that generates you profit each month, hand over fist. That way you have a reason to continue running this thing. I'm also going to show you some of the mindset tricks of how to do all this stuff stress free rather than go through some of the hardships that I had to go through just from not knowing what I didn't know that was causing me to bring up pain in areas that I could have had, easy affluence just from understanding. So I'm going to show you guys some critical information. So it comes from experience. I know that this will help you guys. If you guys have trouble or you guys think this goes over your head, please, I urge you, I implore you, reach out to me personally. I'll try to make sure that I have the time to set aside to understand it or help you understand it. Comment below on any of the videos for any areas that you may feel an additional video could be made for further clarification. This is going to be a slim phase, but it's a critical phase at that. This is Operations, Phase 5.
